title: thelypteris pennigera
intro: Thelypteris pennigera, also known as the pennigerous maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris pennigera include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris pennigera is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for internal use, and as a poultice or topical application for external use.
